58.reason: [Calling DFS on NULL pointer when tree->l is NULL, leading to segmentation fault or undefined behavior]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [If tree->l is NULL, calling DFS on it will cause a segmentation fault. The function does not check for NULL before recursing.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Potential null pointer dereference: if tree->l is NULL, calling DFS on it will crash]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [If tree->l is NULL, this recursive call will dereference a null pointer, causing undefined behavior or crash]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Calling DFS with NULL pointer when tree->l is NULL leads to segmentation fault or undefined behavior]

78.reason: [If the input N is 0, tree remains NULL, and passing NULL to DFS will cause a segmentation fault because DFS immediately accesses tree->l and tree->r without checking if tree is NULL.]
